description: Refactor `update_filtered_data()` by extracting its three filter blocks into three small private helper functions: `filter_by_date(df, date_range)`, `filter_by_group(df, group_select)`, and `filter_by_score(df, score_threshold)`. Each helper should take a data frame and the relevant input value, apply its filter, and return the filtered data frame. `update_filtered_data()` becomes a three-line pipeline calling these helpers in order.
